---
title: "Francis Arthur Yonge"
---

## Francis Arthur Yonge

**Dates:** (1861- 3 Jan 1918)

### Description

nephew of CMY

### Biography

He emigrated to the U.S.A. and married (1892) Edith Louise Isabel Shortride; they adopted a daughter Gwendolene Violet Yonge, who married – Jones. (two says Ian Yonge)

### Letters

- Letter from May 2 [1900]
- Letter from Feb 20th [1897]
- Letter from April 1st 1890[[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Sept 20th 1889
- Letter from April 30th 1889
- Letter from May 3d 1888
- Letter from Aug 19th 1877 
- Letter from July 27th 1876
- Letter from Easter Eve [30 March 1872]
- Letter from Sept 13th [1871]
- Letter from Jany 4th [1870]
- Letter from Decr 1st [1869]
- Letter from [22 November 1868]
- Letter from June 1st 1868
- Letter from Novr 20th [1867]
- Letter from Novr 25th 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
